items.text: scaffolding needs to be removed, material issues, changed materials, suggest new lighting options in report, specify plant types that we can have
skylight glazing options to be figured out
we discussed the stone cladding for the feature wall last time now it's added and complete, Looks Good!

items.transcribedText: scaffolding here needs to be removed. The courtyard needs to have a grass, that work should begin.

Right needs to be cleaned up. These images show very dirty site. All the material vendors are requested to keep their stuff in the storeroom which is of use. Organize the leftover materials which can be of use onto this site and discard and dispose all of the other waste materials.
the attached skylight, you need to find out the relevant covering options, PVC, glass, keep it open and compare the pros and cons of all of these.

The stone wall cladding that we chose as architects is now approved by the client. Next up, the client has to finalize a vendor and a right coating to be done on these stones. The coating needs to be completed as soon as possible to avoid the stones absorb unnecessary moisture and dirt. The stone covering will provide it a look similar to wet stone and completely stop it from absorbing any liquid material.

Most of the plaster work on the exterior surface area is complete. Now in the next stage we need to work on the flooring options in parking area on the three podiums and further installation of electrical points and windows on the facade.
मेन एंट्रेंस गेट पर लगने वाले पत्थर बाकी हैं और रोड का काम इधर बाकी दिख रहा है साथ में इसका जो बूम बैरियर है वो अभी तक नहीं लगा है उसके लिए वेंडर फाइनल करना पड़ेगा और आगे की तैयारी करनी पड़ेगी।

कॉन्ट्रैक्टर साहब, पेंटिंग कॉन्ट्रैक्टर साहब, ये जो एंट्रेंस गेट की पेंटिंग हुई है, ये पेंट का कलर ग्लेजिंग के ऊपर आ गया है, इसकी सफाई चाहिए अपने को। और सिविल कॉन्ट्रैक्टर वाले भैया, इसकी प्लास्टरिंग गेट के आसपास की अच्छी नहीं हुई है, सारा माल ऊंचा-नीचा दिख रहा है। इसको सेम लेवल पर फिर से प्लास्टर करवाना पड़ेगा।
